CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. The ethnicity associated with this Service File, primarily for reporting purposes. This field value for the Primary Applicant will auto-copy to Ethnicity field on the Service File, unless the process to default to Service File has been deactivated. This field is required for 9902 reporting. Contact HomeKeeper Support before customizing to prevent errors when generating the 9902.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Ethnicity associated with this service file, primarily for reporting purposes. This does not auto-fill from the Application Household Members and must be selected manually.
CustomField.label: Ethnicity
